title: Hello Interview topic metadata
description: The meta.json written into each root/<accordion>/<topic>/ folder. Structural facts only — the note.md beside it holds the original prose. Nothing here reproduces copyrighted body text.

accordion.description: Level-1 group: the left-sidebar accordion label, e.g. 'Core Concepts'.

accordionSlug.description: Kebab slug of the accordion; the level-1 folder name.

topic.description: Level-2 label: the topic within the accordion, e.g. 'Caching'.

slug.description: Kebab slug of the topic (usually the URL's last segment); the level-2 folder name.

date.description: The 'Updated <date>' or 'Published <date>' line, verbatim; null if absent.

access.description: 'premium' when the body shows 'Purchase Premium to Keep Reading' or the sidebar item carries a lock icon; otherwise 'free'. Premium pages yield only intro + TOC.

hasVideo.description: True when the page offers a 'Watch Video Walkthrough' / 'Premium users can view this video'.

toc.description: The RIGHT-sidebar 'On This Page' heading list — the 'helpers/context'. Becomes the note.md section scaffold.

relatedBreakdowns.description: The 'Problem Breakdowns with X Pattern' chip labels, when the page lists them (mostly Pattern pages).

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the agent stamped at extraction time, or 'unknown'.
